data.en: He spent about twenty-one hours in space.
data.cn: 他在太空度过了大约21个小时。

data.en: Look at this spaceship.
It's our first spaceship.
data.cn: 这是我们的第一艘飞船。

data.en: I flew to the earth in it a long time ago.
data.cn: 很久以前我乘坐它飞向地球。
data.hint: A long time ago / 很久以前

data.en: My father, Yang Liwei, is a taikonaut, and he is very famous.
data.cn: 我的父亲杨利伟是一名宇航员，他非常出名。

data.en: In October 2003, my father flew into space in Shenzhou V.
data.cn: 2003年10月，我父亲乘坐神舟五号飞入太空。
data.hint: Fly into space / 飞入太空

data.en: He did a lot of work there.
data.cn: 他在那里做了很多工作。
data.hint: Did a lot of work / 做了很多工作

data.en: He also made a video in space.
data.cn: 他还在太空中录制了视频。
data.hint: Make a video / 录制视频

data.en: Then he came back to the earth.
data.hint: Come back (Past tense: came back) / 回来

data.en: My mother and I went to the airport to meet my father.
data.cn: 我和妈妈去机场接我爸爸。
data.hint: Go to the airport / 去机场

data.en: We were very happy.
data.hint: Past tense plural 'were' / 过去式复数 'were'

data.en: It was a great day!
I was very proud of him.
data.hint: Be proud of / 为...感到骄傲

data.en: Now he still tells me about his space travel.
data.cn: 现在他仍然给我讲述他的太空旅行。
data.hint: Tell someone about / 告诉某人关于...

data.en: I want to go into space someday too.
data.cn: 有朝一日我也想进入太空。

data.en: Helen Keller was born in the US in 1880.
data.cn: 海伦·凯勒1880年出生于美国。

data.en: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
data.cn: 在婴儿时期，她就失明和失聪了。

data.en: She couldn't see or hear.
accept: She could not see or hear.

data.en: Helen had a teacher.
She drew letters in Helen's hand and taught her to spell.
data.cn: 她在海伦的手上画字母并教她拼写。

data.en: Later Helen learnt to read, write and speak.
data.cn: 后来海伦学会了读、写和说。
data.hint: Learn to do (British English: learnt) / 学会做
accept: Later Helen learned to read, write and speak.
Later Helen learnt to read, write, and speak.

data.en: She wrote a book about herself.
data.cn: 她写了一本关于自己的书。

data.en: She travelled all over the world.
accept: She traveled all over the world.

data.en: Helen lived to be eighty-seven.
She is a role model for blind people.
And also for you and me.
She couldn't see.
data.hint: Couldn't + base verb / couldn't + 动词原形

data.en: She learnt to speak.
She could also write.
data.hint: Could + base verb / 能够 + 动词原形

data.en: Look up at the spaceship flying in the sky.
data.cn: 抬头看天空中飞行的飞船。

data.en: Shenzhou went into space.
data.hint: Go into (Past tense: went into) / 进入

data.en: It made a loud sound.
data.hint: Make a sound (Past tense: made) / 发出声音

data.en: It went to a new place and travelled round and round.
data.cn: 它去了一个新地方，一圈又一圈地旅行。
data.hint: Round and round / 一圈又一圈

data.en: And inside the spaceship, there was a Chinese man.
data.cn: 在飞船里面，有一位中国男人。

data.en: I want to meet him.
And I want to shake his hand!
Where did I go?
data.hint: Did + base verb / did + 动词原形

data.en: I went there on Saturday.
I spent three hours there.
data.cn: 我在那里花了三个小时。
data.hint: Spend time (Past tense: spent) / 花费时间

data.en: I saw lots of animals.
Did you go to a farm?
data.hint: Did you go...? / 你去了...吗？

data.en: No, I didn't.
data.hint: Negative past short answer / 否定过去简短回答

data.en: Did you go to a zoo?
data.hint: Did + base verb / did + 动词原形

data.en: Yes, I did.
data.hint: Affirmative past short answer / 肯定过去简短回答

data.en: We made a card about a famous person.
data.cn: 我们制作了一张关于名人的卡片。

data.en: He did a lot of work.
data.hint: Did a lot of... / 做了很多...

data.en: Shenzhou V flew into space.
He spent twenty hours in space.
data.cn: 他在太空度过了二十个小时。

data.en: Lots of people met him at the airport.
data.hint: Meet (Past tense: met) / 迎接，遇见

data.en: She learned to read.
